request.description: Updates a person's information by passing in a JSON, XML or YML representation of the updated person.
Adds a new person by passing in a JSON, XML or YML representation of the person.
Find a specific book by your ID
Deletes a specific book by their ID

response.name: Success

request.description: Updates a book's information by passing in a JSON, XML or YML representation of the updated book.
Adds a new book by passing in a JSON, XML or YML representation of the book.
